Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
13.7.4 Composing and Concentrating
(Also see:
HELP EQUILIBRIUM
,
HELP HEALINGLIST
,
HELP AFFLICTIONS
,
HELP
BASECOMMANDS
)
At
times
, you may find yourself in a state of panic where you cannot help
rushing about from room to room! If this happens to you,
COMPOSE
.
At
other
times, your mental
equilibrium
may be so disrupted somehow that it
simply will not come back. This can happen, for example, if you are very
cold. Normally when you
lose
equilibrium, you merely have to wait to
regain it. However, in this disrupted state, equilibrium will not return
no matter how long you wait. If this happens to you, simply
CONCENTRATE
.
There is an affliction called confusion which will prevent you from being
able to concentrate until you
cure
the confusion. You can
look
up what
cures
confusion in
HELP AFFLICTIONS
.
If you came to this help
scroll
in error, and you are actually
looking
for information on how to COMPOSE a personal
background
or
history
, see
HELP BACKGROUND
.
(Also see:
HELP EQUILIBRIUM
,
HELP HEALINGLIST
,
HELP AFFLICTIONS
,
HELP BASECOMMANDS)
